fields.title: Courier Run
fields.description: Move a package across district lines without getting burned.
fields.recon_text_low: Two routes, both exposed. You'll need to improvise under pressure.
fields.recon_text_mid: You spot patrol rhythm and choke points, enough to avoid the worst timing.
fields.recon_text_high: You lock in dead drops, route switches, and backup exits before the pickup.

fields.title: Debt Collection
fields.description: Collect from a debtor with options to escalate or keep it discreet.
fields.recon_text_low: Target is jumpy and likely to bolt if pushed too hard too soon.
fields.recon_text_mid: You identify where the debtor hides and who might cover for them.
fields.recon_text_high: You know leverage points, backup muscle patterns, and the best pressure window.

fields.title: Protection Racket
fields.description: Collect from a business behind on weekly protection and keep it controlled.
fields.recon_text_low: Owner is nervous and neighbors are watching. Any mistake brings witnesses.
fields.recon_text_mid: You identify which employees can be pressured and which one can smooth things over.
fields.recon_text_high: You know who actually controls the books and how to force compliance without lingering.

fields.title: Store Robbery
fields.description: Small storefront with predictable cash movement and uneven security.
fields.recon_text_low: Foot traffic is heavy and the register swaps are irregular. You'll need speed more than finesse.
fields.recon_text_mid: You spot the shift change and a side entrance that gives you a cleaner angle on the floor.
fields.recon_text_high: You map camera blind spots, safe timing, and a clean exit lane before anyone notices you're there.
